'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/feed\/@j900701?__cf_chl_rt_tk=cSQvLgRzkN5vf5wHnQ73Ti3Buowwk0vh2QFQ5dI79Fs-1772704201-1.0.1.1-BtFMqvEiZjvM_DGIzFqs_dn1E9GHSAMJFTYzDhYaag8"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
